pi_items.source: Reference file contains 36 unique stations: Anacostia, Archives, Arlington Cemetery, Ashburn, Ballston, Bethesda, Branch Ave, Capitol South, College Park, Dupont Circle, Eastern Market, Farragut North, Farragut West, Federal Triangle, Foggy Bottom, Fort Totten, Franconia-Springfield, Gallery Place, Glenmont, Greenbelt, Huntington, L'Enfant Plaza, Largo, Metro Center, Mt Vernon Sq, Navy Yard, New Carrollton, Pentagon, Rosslyn, Shady Grove, Silver Spring, Smithsonian, Stadium-Armory, Tysons, Union Station, Vienna
Red Line: 9 edges, Orange: 11, Silver: 12, Blue: 13, Yellow: 5, Green: 9 edges = 59 total inter-station connections
Reference file uses 6 distinct line colors verified against official WMATA Brand Guidelines: Red (#BF0D3E), Orange (#ED8B00), Silver (#919D9D), Blue (#009CDE), Yellow (#FFD100), Green (#00B140)
Reference file marks 6 interchange stations. The 4 metadata stations are all present; reference file marks 2 additional interchanges not required by metadata

Reference file contains 11 termini: Shady Grove (RED), Glenmont (RED), Vienna (ORANGE), New Carrollton (ORANGE), Ashburn (SILVER), Largo (SILVER/BLUE shared), Franconia-Springfield (BLUE - NOT 'Franconia'), Huntington (YELLOW), Mt Vernon Sq (YELLOW - missing from metadata), Branch Ave (GREEN), Greenbelt (GREEN)

privileged_info_summary: The DC Metro Transit Map task uses synthetic data generated by setup_task.sh based on the real WMATA Washington Metro system. The reference file (wmata_metro_lines.txt) contains 36 unique stations across 6 lines with official WMATA colors (verified against WMATA Brand Guidelines): Red (#BF0D3E), Orange (#ED8B00), Silver (#919D9D), Blue (#009CDE), Yellow (#FFD100), Green (#00B140). The reference defines 59 total inter-station edges, 6 interchange stations (Metro Center, Gallery Place, L'Enfant Plaza, Rosslyn, Fort Totten, Pentagon), and 11 terminal stations. DISCREPANCY: The metadata lists terminus 'Franconia' but the reference file correctly names it 'Franconia-Springfield'. Additionally, Mt Vernon Square is a terminus in the reference file but is not listed in the metadata's required_termini. OUTDATED DATA: The reference file shows the Yellow Line terminating at Mt Vernon Square, but as of December 31, 2025, the actual WMATA Yellow Line has been extended to Greenbelt.
